nasb.text: So the father knew that it was at that hour in which Jesus said to him, “Your son lives”; and he himself believed and his whole household.

esv.text: The father knew that was the hour when Jesus had said to him, “Your son will live.” And he himself believed, and all his household.

cnv.text: 這父親就知道，那正是耶穌告訴他“你的兒子好了”的時候，他自己和全家就信了。

ccb.text: 他想起正是那时候耶稣对他说：“你的儿子好了！”他和全家都信了。

csbs.text: 这位父亲就知道，那正是耶稣说“你的儿子活了”的时间。于是他自己和全家人都信了。
